top_signals.title: Iran reviews U.S. peace proposal as Trump says he’s willing to wait 'a few days'
top_signals.summary: It comes after President Donald Trump said he was prepared to wait a few more days to "get the right answers" from Tehran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ubisoft shares plunge 16% after Assassin’s Creed maker warns of annual profit loss
top_signals.summary: Ubisoft shares plunged on Thursday after the Assassin's Creed maker warned of further losses this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agnico doubles Wallbridge Mining stake to over 19%
top_signals.summary: The investment is part of a C$56 million private placement of Wallbridge shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Core Lithium restarts Finniss mine on price rebound
top_signals.summary: Recovering spodumene prices are prompting Australian lithium producers to revive suspended mines and expansion plans.
